The '''iceworm''', also spelled '''ice worm''', was a burrowing species of annelid native to the ice [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Hoth/Legends|Hoth]]. The tidal pull of Hoth's three nameless [[Moon/Legends|moons]] caused fissures in the ice-layers of the massive frozen [[Ocean/Legends|ocean]] in Hoth's southern hemisphere, sending jets of ocean [[Water/Legends|water]] into the freezing air. The intense cold froze these jets into spires of ice, suspending primitive ocean algae in these tall columns and glaciers. The iceworms would carve their way through the ice to feed on the [[Algae/Legends|algae]], leaving odd tiny holes in the ice.<ref name="GG3">''[[Galaxy Guide 3: The Empire Strikes Back]]''</ref> When Hoth's winds blew through these iceworm tunnels, they produced an eerie musical sound.<ref name="The Illustrated Star Wars Universe">''[[The Illustrated Star Wars Universe]]''</ref>
